transactions.desc: The Twins optioned Wallner to Triple-A St. Paul on Thursday, Betsy Helfand of the St. Paul Pioneer Press reports.
Paddack signed a one-year deal with the Reds on Wednesday and is slated to start Saturday's game against the Guardians in Cleveland, C. Trent Rosecrans of The Athletic reports.
The Athletics recalled Barnett from Triple-A Las Vegas on Wednesday.
The Marlins reinstated Fairbanks (hand) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday.
The Mets recalled Senger from Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday.
The Reds designated HIggins for assignment Wednesday.
Paddack signed a major-league contract with the Reds on Wednesday.
The Mariners designated Suarez for assignment Wednesday.
Baltimore recalled Handley from Triple-A Norfolk on Wednesday.
The Mariners reinstated Miller (oblique) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his scheduled start Wednesday in Houston.
The Guardians optioned Aleman to Triple-A Columbus on Wednesday.
Heuer was recalled from Triple-A Columbus on Wednesday.
The Angels activated Johnson (hamstring) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday, Jeff Fletcher of The Orange County Register reports.
The Pirates recalled Rodriguez from Triple-A Indianapolis on Tuesday, Danny Demilio of PittsburghBaseballNow.com reports.
The Pirates recalled Bidois from Triple-A Indianapolis on Tuesday.
Trivino cleared waivers Tuesday and elected free agency, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
The Orioles recalled Wells from Triple-A Norfolk on Tuesday, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
Garcia (back) completed his rehab assignment and returned to Triple-A Indianapolis on Tuesday, Alex Stumpf of MLB.com reports.
The Athletics designated Nunez for assignment Tuesday.
The Athletics selected Stefanic's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Athletics optioned Harris to Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Athletics selected Bolte's contract from Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Pirates optioned Sanders to Triple-A Indianapolis on Tuesday, Alex Stumpf of MLB.com reports.
The Astros optioned VanWey to Triple-A Sugar Land on Tuesday, Julia Morales of Space City Home Network reports.
The Astros reinstated Imai (arm) from the 15-day injured list to start Tuesday's game against the Mariners, Julia Morales of Space City Home Network reports.
The Brewers optioned Black to Triple-A Nashville on Tuesday.
The Yankees recalled from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Tuesday.
The Brewers reinstated Yelich (groin) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday.
The Rockies optioned Gordon to Triple-A Albuquerque on Tuesday.
The Rockies reinstated Herget (personal) from the bereavement list Tuesday.
